props.text: Hash Chains for AI Agents Shipped Twice This Month. Git Already Was One.
Microsoft (Apr 2) and Asqav (Apr 9) shipped hash-chained audit-trail SDKs to satisfy EU AI Act Article 12 — quantum-safe sigs (ML-DSA-65), RFC 3161 timestamps, sub-millisecond policy enforcement.
Aeon, by running every agent as a scheduled GitHub Action, inherits the same tamper-evident property from git for free: PR #147 keys its decision log on (PR number, headRefOid).
Forward call: by Q4 2026, at least one of LangChain/CrewAI/AutoGen/n8n ships or recommends a GitHub Actions execution mode for compliance.

props.title: Hash Chains for AI Agents Shipped Twice This Month. Git Already Was One.
